classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是动力线表格，列出'引线号 Pin No'与'信号定义 Defintion'的对应关系，1、2、3、4分别对应U、V、W、PE，属于动力接口相线和保护地的针脚定义。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Localized to the thin digit 4 left of the top row of connector pins; excludes adjacent black pin shape.
Localized to the thin digit 1 right of the top row of connector pins; excludes nearby pin and border lines.
Localized to the lower-left thin digit 7 inside the connector face; excludes adjacent lower pin.
Localized to the lower-right thin digit 5 inside the connector face; excludes adjacent lower pin.
Localized to the bold central 3S marking; tight around the two glyphs and excludes surrounding pins.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'电机性能参数Motor performance parameters'表格，包含额定转矩3.18 N.m、最大转矩9.54 N.m、额定转速3000 rpm、最大转速5000 rpm等电机扭矩与转速性能数据；全图中该表与右侧TN曲线同页对应，最接近扭矩转速性能类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机'TN曲线图 TN Graph'，含转矩纵轴、转速'rpm'横轴、短时工作区和连续工作区，并标注'(2500, 9.54)'、'(3000, 3.18)'、'5000, 0'等扭矩-转速特征点，属于扭矩-转速性能曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR punctuation from '(2500.9.54)' to coordinate pair '(2500, 9.54)'.
Corrected OCR from '9' to visible y-axis tick value '6' based on tick position.
Corrected OCR punctuation from '5000.0' to coordinate pair '5000, 0'.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: rpm for speed axis and N·m for torque axis as explicitly labeled

terminology_notes: The word 'workspace' is preserved as shown, although 'operating region' is the engineering interpretation.

dimension_records.reason: This is the vertical axis engineering quantity and unit label of the torque-speed curve.
This is the horizontal axis engineering quantity and unit label of the torque-speed curve.
The label identifies the upper operating area of the torque-speed graph.
The label identifies the lower continuous operating area of the torque-speed graph.
The coordinate annotation marks the upper plateau endpoint of the short term torque curve.
The coordinate annotation marks the knee point of the continuous torque curve.
The coordinate annotation marks the right endpoint where the curves meet the zero torque line.
These OCR boxes are horizontal axis tick labels and are reference scale values rather than separate dimensions.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: OCR 可见转矩刻度：2、3、5、6、8 N·m
dimension_records.reason: These OCR boxes are vertical axis tick labels; only tick labels with source_ids are retained, and one tick was corrected by position.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: OCR 可见转矩刻度：2、3、5、6、8 N·m

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Several visually present axis tick labels and the graph title have no usable OCR source_id in the provided boxes, so they are not added as text annotations.

unresolved_items.issue: Low-confidence overlapping OCR fragment inside the '(2500, 9.54)' label; deleted as noise.
Duplicate partial OCR reading of the '(2500, 9.54)' label; not used separately.
Very low-confidence OCR fragment near y-axis tick area; deleted as noise.
Overlapping partial OCR reads of the torque axis label; replaced by the complete OCR source ocr_012.
Duplicate partial OCR reading of the '5000, 0' coordinate label; not used separately.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪区域是编码器性能参数表，包含类型与分辨率等规格信息，没有引脚编号、接线定义或曲线图。四类中最接近的是机械尺寸类图纸中的产品参数信息。
